metadata.note: Questions KG v3 — testent la detection de tensions cross-doc (REFINES, QUALIFIES, evolutions). Basees sur les 252 tensions cross-doc verifiees dans le KG.

questions.question: L'authentification par certificats X.509 est-elle decrite de la meme maniere dans les Security Guides 2022 et 2023 ?

claim1.text: User authentication using X.509 client certificates is performed on the Web server

claim2.text: User authentication is performed on the Web server using the Secure Sockets Layer

questions.question: Les autorisations E-Recruiting sont-elles documentees de facon coherente entre les deux Security Guides ?

claim1.text: P_RCF_POOL is an authorization object that specifies within SAP E-Recruiting which data overviews

claim2.text: Authorization object specifies which SAP E-Recruiting application a user can call

questions.question: L'objet d'archivage RDBAA_FRP est-il documente de la meme maniere dans les deux Security Guides ?

claim1.text: You use the archiving object RDBAA_FRP to archive final results that are stored in the results database

claim2.text: You use the archiving object RDBAA_FRP to archive final results stored in the results database

questions.question: Le BAdI HRASR00ATTACHMENT_HANDLING est-il decrit differemment entre les Security Guides 2022 et 2023 ?

claim1.text: Business Add-In (BAdI) HRASR00ATTACHMENT_HANDLING is used for defining the file types

claim2.text: This section provides information on a Business Add-In (BAdI) that can be used for defining file types

questions.question: Le concept d'autorisation Cross-Application Time Sheet (CA-TS) a-t-il change entre les deux Security Guides ?

claim1.text: The Cross-Application Time Sheet (CA-TS) uses authorization objects

claim2.text: The Cross-Application Time Sheet (CA-TS) uses the authorization concept provided by the system

questions.question: La planification SOP (Standard SOP) est-elle presentee de la meme maniere entre le Feature Scope on-premise et Cloud Private Edition ?

claim1.text: Standard SOP enables you to perform resource leveling for production resources

claim2.text: Standard SOP enables you to perform resource leveling for costs

questions.question: Le contenu du cost of sales ledger est-il decrit differemment entre les deux Feature Scope Descriptions ?

claim1.text: The contents of the cost of sales ledger and all special ledgers created in table

claim2.text: The contents of the reconciliation ledger and all special ledgers created in table

questions.question: L'application log (transaction SLG1) enregistre-t-il les memes informations dans le Operations Guide 2021 et 2023 ?

claim1.text: The application log (transaction SLG1) records the message exchange between SAP components

claim2.text: The application log (transaction SLG1) records all messages sent to or received from external systems

questions.question: La transaction /SAPAPO/OM17 est-elle decrite avec les memes capacites dans les Operations Guides 2021 et 2022 ?

claim1.text: Transaction /SAPAPO/OM17 checks the consistency of master data in liveCache by comparing

claim2.text: Transaction /SAPAPO/OM17 offers an option to resolve inconsistencies between liveCache and database

questions.question: Le process scheduler de Product Compliance est-il decrit de la meme facon dans les Operations Guides 2021 et 2023 ?

claim1.text: The process scheduler of Product Compliance is used for recurring tasks

claim2.text: The Product Compliance for Discrete Industries process scheduler is integrated in the system

questions.question: La gestion des elements WBS est-elle presentee differemment entre le Feature Scope on-premise et Cloud Private Edition ?

claim1.text: Creating a grouping WBS element and including it in the operative WBS structure

claim2.text: This helps to segregate costs of key parts and assemblies from the MRP-driving operative WBS elements

questions.question: Le process foundation est-il decrit de la meme facon dans les Operations Guides 2021 et 2022 ?

claim1.text: The process foundation links together the SAP Business Workflow engine and the Business Rule Framework

claim2.text: The process foundation links together the SAP Business Workflow engine and the Business Rule Framework

questions.question: Les roles E-Recruiting SAP_ERC_INT_CAND ont-ils la meme description dans les Security Guides 2022 et 2023 ?

claim1.text: SAP_ERC_INT_CAND_CLIENT_CI_4 provides necessary authorizations for an internal candidate

claim2.text: SAP_RCF_UNREG_CANDIDATE_CLIENT role contains necessary authorizations for unregistered candidates

questions.question: L'objet d'autorisation P_ORGXXCON et P_ORGINCON sont-ils documentes de la meme facon entre les deux Security Guides ?

claim1.text: The authorization object consists of the same fields as the authorization object P_ORGINCON

claim2.text: P_P_ORGXXCON is an authorization object that consists of the same fields as P_ORGINCON

questions.question: La planification detaillee des produits finis est-elle presentee differemment entre les deux Feature Scope Descriptions ?

claim1.text: You can perform detailed planning of finished products using Standard SOP

claim2.text: You can perform high-level planning of product groups using Standard SOP

questions.question: Les prepayment agreements sont-ils lies aux memes types de documents dans les deux Feature Scope Descriptions ?

claim1.text: Barter prepayment agreements are linked to sales documents such as sales orders

claim2.text: Prepayment agreements are linked to purchase documents such as trading contracts

questions.question: La gestion des couts de scrap est-elle traitee differemment entre les Feature Scope on-premise et PCE ?

claim1.text: The costs tied to loss from MRP-driving operative WBS elements can be segregated

claim2.text: The costs associated with scrap can be directed to other project WBS elements

questions.question: L'impact de la planning procedure sur les secondary control cycles differe-t-il entre les Feature Scope Descriptions ?

claim1.text: When a secondary control cycle is assigned a planning procedure, it is not relevant

claim2.text: The secondary control cycle's planning procedure does not affect the type of planning

questions.question: Le report ARBFND_SEND_STATUS est-il reference de la meme facon dans les Operations Guides 2022 et 2023 ?

claim1.text: The report Send Status Update for Canceled Inbound Messages (ARBFND_SEND_STATUS_UPDATE)

claim2.text: The report Send Status Update for Canceled Inbound Messages (ARBFND_SEND_STATUS_UPDATE)

questions.question: La gestion des freight units dans le VSR optimizer est-elle presentee differemment entre les deux Feature Scope ?

claim1.text: VSR optimization inserts the freight units step-by-step into the transportation plan

claim2.text: VSR optimization inserts freight units into the transportation plan

questions.question: Le JIT call processing est-il decrit de la meme facon dans les Feature Scope on-premise et Cloud Private Edition ?

claim1.text: You can use the JIT call processing feature for processing JIT calls

claim2.text: JIT call processing is available for manufacturing execution

questions.question: La Product Compliance est-elle integree de la meme facon dans les Operations Guides 2021 et 2023 ?

claim1.text: The process scheduler of Product Compliance is used for recurring tasks

claim2.text: The Product Compliance for Discrete Industries process scheduler is integrated in the system

questions.question: Les external customer/vendor items AP/AR sont-ils traites de la meme facon dans les deux Feature Scope ?

claim1.text: Other external customer/vendor AP/AR items under the same company code

claim2.text: External customer/vendor AP/AR items are managed under the company code

questions.question: La Product Compliance dans le secteur Discrete Industries est-elle traitee de la meme facon dans les Security Guides et les Operations Guides ?

claim1.text: Several business processes within Product Compliance for Discrete Industries

claim2.text: The Product Compliance for Discrete Industries process scheduler is integrated

questions.question: Le Project Cost Planning est-il reference dans les memes contextes entre les Security Guides et les Operations Guides ?

claim1.text: The Project Cost and Revenue Planning application uses the transaction types

claim2.text: Project Cost and Revenue Planning requires specific authorization objects
